text:
Fakes, Swindles, and the Old Switcheroo (93, Kugatsu Mikka—lit. "September 3 rd ") is the 10 th volume of the Hunter × Hunter manga series. It was released by Shueisha on November 2 nd , 2000 in Japan and by Viz Media on September 5 th , 2006 in English.

Chapters

84. September 2 nd : Part 6 (9⑥, Kugatsu Futsuka (Roku))
85. September 3 rd : Part 1 (93①, Kugatsu Mikka (Ichi))
86. September 3 rd : Part 2 (93②, Kugatsu Mikka (Ni))
87. September 3 rd : Part 3 (93③, Kugatsu Mikka (San))
88. September 3 rd : Part 4 (93④, Kugatsu Mikka (Yon))
89. September 3 rd : Part 5 (93⑤, Kugatsu Mikka (Go))
90. September 3 rd : Part 6 (93⑥, Kugatsu Mikka (Roku))
91. September 3 rd : Part 7 (93⑦, Kugatsu Mikka (Nana))
92. September 3 rd : Part 8 (93⑧, Kugatsu Mikka (Hachi))
93. September 3 rd : Part 9 (93⑨, Kugatsu Mikka (Kyū))

Summary

After healing his broken arm and explaining that his Chain Jail ability enforces Zetsu on the captured target, Kurapika begins his torture of Uvogin, asking him about the location and abilities of the other Phantom Troupe members. With Uvogin refusing to answer, Kurapika eventually uses his Judgment Chain on him and orders him to answer truthfully. However, when Uvogin again doesn't answer Kurapika's question about the Spiders' location, the chain crushes his heart and kills him instantly, with Kurapika burying his body in the Gordeau Desert before heading back to the city.

Gon, Killua, and Leorio reach nothing but dead ends looking for information on the Spiders by themselves, so they decide to take an interest-free loan of 100 million for Gon's Hunter License, allowing them to pay out rewards for information. While Leorio sifts through the offered information, Gon and Killua discover that they can use Gyo to find valuable items at a street auction, and the two start to use this method to make money. They meet an antiques expert named Zepile who prevents them from getting swindled when they try to sell the items they found, and the two boys wind up making him their auction agent, for a cut of the final proceeds.

By this time, the Troupe realizes that Uvogin must have been killed by the chain user since he hasn't returned. After Nobunaga and Machi are sent out to find any traces of Kurapika, Gon and Killua follow them based on a tip from an informant. This, however, results in the boys being captured and brought back to the Troupe's hideout on the outskirts of the city, where they are interrogated about the chain user. Not knowing Kurapika's abilities or actions, they pass the questioning, but Nobunaga is intrigued by the pair and holds them captive, intending to have Chrollo interview them and let them join the Spiders. However, Gon and Killua utilize the doctoring methods they learned from Zepile and begin their escape from Nobunaga.
